sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85677" key="pontisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποντ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n85677.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who casts into the sea,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:52:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.52.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
